title: Best VPN for Netherlands in 2026: Privacy, Speed, and Streaming
description: The Netherlands has strong internet infrastructure but active surveillance programs. Here is which VPN to use for privacy, streaming Dutch content abroad, and bypassing geo-blocks.
content:
## Why Dutch Users Need a VPN

The Netherlands operates under the EU's data retention directive and has active intelligence-sharing agreements through the Nine Eyes alliance. Dutch ISPs are required to log connection metadata. For users who care about privacy, a VPN routes traffic through an encrypted tunnel, preventing your ISP from seeing what you visit.

Beyond privacy, Dutch users also use VPNs to access content that is geo-restricted when traveling abroad, to secure connections on public Wi-Fi, and to access streaming libraries in other countries.

## Top VPNs for Netherlands Users

### NordVPN

NordVPN operates servers in Amsterdam and Rotterdam with reliably fast speeds on Dutch infrastructure. It uses NordLynx (WireGuard-based) for maximum speed and has a clear no-logs policy audited by Deloitte. The Netherlands servers handle streaming, torrenting, and everyday browsing well. NordVPN is available in Dutch and offers a 30-day money-back guarantee.

### ExpressVPN

ExpressVPN has Dutch servers and is one of the fastest options for accessing international streaming content. Its Lightway protocol is optimised for mobile use. ExpressVPN has an independent audit from KPMG confirming its no-logs policy. Slightly more expensive than NordVPN but consistently reliable.

### ProtonVPN

ProtonVPN is Swiss-based and operates outside EU data retention requirements, which matters to privacy-focused users. It has servers in Amsterdam and offers a free tier with no data cap, making it the best free option for Netherlands users. The paid plan adds more servers, higher speeds, and streaming support.

### Mullvad

Mullvad is a Swedish VPN that accepts anonymous payment including cash and crypto. It keeps no logs, requires no email to sign up, and has Dutch servers. It is slower to set up than NordVPN but offers stronger anonymity for users who want to minimise their digital footprint entirely.

## Accessing Dutch Content Abroad

If you travel outside the Netherlands and want to access NPO Start, Videoland, or RTL XL, connect to a Dutch server with your VPN. These services detect your IP address to verify you are in the Netherlands. NordVPN and ExpressVPN both unblock Dutch streaming services reliably.

## Streaming International Content from the Netherlands

Netflix NL has a smaller library than Netflix US. Connecting to a US server gives you access to the full American library including titles not available in the Netherlands. NordVPN and ExpressVPN both work with Netflix US from Dutch IP addresses.

## Legal Status of VPNs in the Netherlands

VPNs are fully legal in the Netherlands. There are no restrictions on their use for privacy purposes. Using a VPN for illegal activities remains illegal regardless of the VPN. Dutch law focuses on the activity, not the tool.

## What to Look For

For Netherlands users, prioritise: Dutch server locations for low latency, a confirmed no-logs policy, WireGuard protocol support for speed, and compatibility with Dutch streaming services if needed. All four VPNs listed above meet these criteria.
